top_stories.title: Jensen Huang says Nvidia is pulling back from OpenAI and Anthropic, but his explanation raises more questions than it answers
top_stories.description: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said Wednesday that his company's investments in OpenAI and Anthropic will likely be its last — but his explanation may not tell the whole story.
top_stories.author: Connie Loizos
top_stories.content: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang said Wednesday that his company's investments in OpenAI and Anthropic will likely be its last — but his explanation may not tell the whole story.

top_stories.title: Women Leading the Next Era of AI Innovation
top_stories.description: Women leading the next era of AI innovation are driving open ecosystems, ethical AI, and faster innovation beyond closed tech empires. The classic script of technological hegemony was a familiar and imperial trajectory: develop a proprietary base, take the data hostage, and customer-lock in. Winning was having the biggest closed... top_stories.title: Nimble raises $47M to scale agentic web search platform for enterprise AI
top_stories.description: Nimble announced today that it has raised $47 million in new funding to accelerate development of its agentic web search platform, expand its multi-agent research capabilities and scale up its governed real-time web data infrastructure for enterprise artificial intelligence deployments. top_stories.title: Arvind KC appointed Chief People Officer
top_stories.description: OpenAI appoints Arvind KC as Chief People Officer to help scale the company, strengthen its culture, and lead how work evolves in the age of AI.
top_stories.content: OpenAI appoints Arvind KC as Chief People Officer to help scale the company, strengthen its culture, and lead how work evolves in the age of AI.

top_stories.title: LangWatch Open Sources the Missing Evaluation Layer for AI Agents to Enable End-to-End Tracing, Simulation, and Systematic Testing
top_stories.description: As AI development shifts from simple chat interfaces to complex, multi-step autonomous agents, the industry has encountered a significant bottleneck: non-determinism. Unlike traditional software where code follows a predictable path, agents built on LLMs introduce a high degree of variance. LangWatch is an open-source platform designed to address this by providing a standardized layer for […] The post LangWatch Open Sources the Missing Evaluation Layer for AI Agents to Enable End-to-End...
